## What changed?

Describe the user problem and the solution. Keep the scope focused.

## How was it verified?

List the commands, devices, and journeys you checked.

## Sources

Required for tournament-data or highlight changes. Link the exact primary or
reputable sources and explain any normalization.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and followed the licensing requirements.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, downloaded match footage, or unrelated files.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes.
- [ ] Relevant Playwright tests pass.
- [ ] Data audits pass, if this changes tournament or highlight data.
- [ ] The UI remains keyboard accessible and respects reduced motion.
- [ ] I tested the affected layout on desktop and mobile, if applicable.

## Screenshots or recording

Include before/after evidence for visible interface changes.
